description: Gelesis Holdings / B. Riley Principal Capital II — Capital on Demand Purchase Agreement (8-K, 2022-08-11)
notes: Gold issues manually identified. clause_id is optional — omit when the issue is agreement-level rather than tied to a specific clause.

issues.notes: Only 5 business days notice required to terminate — unusually short for a $50M commitment

issues.issue: High discount rate combined with variable pricing modes
issues.notes: 3% VWAP discount across multiple purchase modes creates elevated dilution exposure

issues.issue: Broad exchange issuance cap near regulatory maximum
issues.notes: 19.99% issuance cap is at the practical ceiling for exchange listing rules
4.99% cap barely clears the Section 13(d) disclosure threshold — minimal protection
$50M ceiling is material relative to issuer size

issues.issue: No governing law or jurisdiction specified
issues.notes: Agreement does not specify which state law governs or which courts have jurisdiction
No arbitration clause or litigation venue specified

issues.issue: Company cannot terminate for convenience without triggering notice period
issues.notes: Termination is heavily weighted toward the purchaser
